item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Affiliate Disclosure

SpottedHQ participates in affiliate programs, which means we may earn a commission when you click on links and make a purchase. This comes at no extra cost to you.

How it works:

  • We include affiliate links to products and tools we review
  • If you purchase through our links, we may receive a small commission
  • This helps us keep the site running and continue producing honest reviews

Our promise:

item.title: Newsletter
item.description: Get the best tool picks and product finds delivered weekly.
